title: American Cats: The Good, the Bad, and the Cuddly
original_title: American Cats: The Good, the Bad, and the Cuddly
overview: Ontario is the only province in Canada without a ban on cat declawing. Amy Hoggart, the hilarious correspondent from Full Frontal with Samantha Bee, cracks jokes, cuddles kittens and attacks this controversial practice using satire to expose a heart-wrenching catspiracy.
